description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, using the node:14 Docker image. In the test stage add a test job that caches the node_modules/ directory, runs `yarn install` then `yarn test`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs before_script commands `yarn global add react-scripts`, `yarn global add netlify-cli`, and `yarn install && yarn build`, then executes `netlify deploy --site=\"$NETLIFY_SITE\" --auth=\"$NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN\" --dir=build/ --prod --message=\"$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE\"`. The deploy job should only run on the master branch of the denkmal/denkmal-website-admin project and uses the NETLIFY_SITE variable. No artifacts are defined.
